# Azure.ResourceManager.ApiManagement analyzer allow-list
#
# This package is freshly generated by the management-plane (MPG) C# code
# generator. The current generator emits calls to the reflection-based
# ModelReaderWriter.Read<T>(BinaryData, ModelReaderWriterOptions) overload
# in every generated Serialization.cs, which trips the AOT/trim analyzers
# below. Until the MPG generator is updated to emit the
# ModelReaderWriter.Read(BinaryData, ModelReaderWriterContext) overload
# (which carries the source-generated context required for trim/AOT
# friendliness), these diagnostics fire from generated code we don't own.
#
# Scoped #pragma is not viable because the warnings fire on hundreds of
# generated files that are regenerated from TypeSpec on every build,
# wiping out any inline suppression. The suppression is genuinely
# project-wide and cannot currently be narrowed.

# IL2026: Members attributed with RequiresUnreferencedCode may break when
# trimming. The ModelReaderWriter.Read<T> reflection overload is marked
# RequiresUnreferencedCode, so every generated DeserializeXxx helper call
# trips it.
nowarn:IL2026

# IL3050: Calling members attributed with RequiresDynamicCode may break
# native AOT applications. Same root cause as IL2026 — the reflection
# overload of ModelReaderWriter.Read is marked RequiresDynamicCode.
nowarn:IL3050
